philosophy.notes: Dark technical product UI still matches CP-Tutor, but the product posture is now AI Mentor-first instead of judge-first with a helper panel.

hierarchy.notes: The solve screen now gives Mentor a large workspace with plan, hint, debug, chat, and line walkthrough modules; submission review opens with AI diagnosis before code evidence.

execution.notes: Shared tokens/components keep the 10 HTML pages consistent; responsive rules cover tablet by simplifying columns and using an AI drawer.

specificity.notes: Mentor content is tied to Two Sum Sorted, C++17, pointer movement, WA root cause, patch suggestion, and reproducible tests rather than generic chatbot copy.

restraint.notes: Accent use stays limited to actions, active states, and status badges; no marketing hero, generic gradients, or decorative filler.
